## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Linked Issues

Fixes #

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring or maintenance
- [ ] Build, release, or CI

## Impact

- Public API or configuration changes:
- Compatibility or migration notes:
- Security or privacy considerations:

## Verification

- Tests added or updated:
- Checks run:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated formatting or refactoring.
- [ ] Documentation was updated, or no documentation change is needed.
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior, or no behavior changed.
- [ ] Public APIs have Javadocs where applicable.
- [ ] Policy evaluation failures are surfaced as `ErrorValue` where applicable.
- [ ] Dead code, obsolete TODOs, and new warnings were removed.
- [ ] Relevant Maven checks were run and are listed above.
- [ ] All commits are signed.
